generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent‑magnet synchronous motor current sensor on the first rotary axis, providing motor current data streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorShaftEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Incremental encoder on the motor shaft, providing joint angle, angular velocity, torque estimation, and acceleration data streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorShaftAngleDataTransmitted,
                        MotorShaftVelocityDataTransmitted,
                        MotorShaftTorqueDataTransmitted,
                        MotorShaftAccelerationDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxOutputEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Incremental encoder on the gearbox output, providing joint angle, angular velocity, torque estimation, and acceleration data streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxOutputAngleDataTransmitted,
                        GearboxOutputVelocityDataTransmitted,
                        GearboxOutputTorqueDataTransmitted,
                        GearboxOutputAccelerationDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorShaftAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorShaftEncoder
]

instance MotorShaftVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorShaftEncoder
]

instance MotorShaftTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorShaftEncoder
]

instance MotorShaftAccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorShaftEncoder
]

instance GearboxOutputAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxOutputEncoder
]

instance GearboxOutputVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxOutputEncoder
]

instance GearboxOutputTorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxOutputEncoder
]

instance GearboxOutputAccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxOutputEncoder
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance StructuralEngineModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML structural engineering model of the motor, gearbox and cycloidal gearbox of the first rotary axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModeler
]

instance MotorSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable MATLAB/Simulink model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor including current sensor dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSim
]

instance GearboxSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable MATLAB/Simulink model of the gearbox including encoder dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSim
]

instance SystemSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable MATLAB/Simulink model of the overall axis system combining motor, gearbox and kinematic chain."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSim
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box friction law model implementing Coulomb‑Viscous dynamics for joint friction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSim
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box friction law model implementing Stribeck dynamics for transient friction behavior."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSim
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box friction law model implementing Dahl dynamics for static friction hysteresis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSim
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White‑box friction law model implementing LuGre dynamics for combined dynamic friction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSim
]

// Data traces
instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current trace derived from MotorCurrentDataTransmitted."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSim
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MeasuredPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured joint position trace derived from MotorShaftAngleDataTransmitted and GearboxOutputAngleDataTransmitted."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSim
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorShaftAngleDataTransmitted,
                     GearboxOutputAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance MeasuredVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular velocity trace derived from MotorShaftVelocityDataTransmitted and GearboxOutputVelocityDataTransmitted."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSim
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorShaftVelocityDataTransmitted,
                     GearboxOutputVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque trace derived from MotorShaftTorqueDataTransmitted and GearboxOutputTorqueDataTransmitted."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSim
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorShaftTorqueDataTransmitted,
                     GearboxOutputTorqueDataTransmitted
]

instance MeasuredAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured acceleration trace derived from MotorShaftAccelerationDataTransmitted and GearboxOutputAccelerationDataTransmitted."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSim
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorShaftAccelerationDataTransmitted,
                     GearboxOutputAccelerationDataTransmitted
]

instance SimulatedCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor current trace generated by the MATLAB/Simulink motor model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSim
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorSimulinkModel
]

instance SimulatedPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated joint position trace generated by the MATLAB/Simulink system model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSim
    DTDFVocab:fromData SystemSimulinkModel
]

instance SimulatedVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity trace generated by the MATLAB/Simulink system model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSim
    DTDFVocab:fromData SystemSimulinkModel
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque trace generated by the MATLAB/Simulink system model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkSim
    DTDFVocab:fromData SystemSimulinkModel
]

// C11: Enablers
instance StructuralVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that visualizes the structural model of the axis."
]

instance SysMLModeler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tooling used to create and maintain the structural engineering model of the axis."
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralVisualizationService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkSim : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink execution environment used for running the motor, gearbox, system and friction law models."
    DTDFVocab:enables ExecutableSimulationService,
                      ContinuousIdentificationService,
                      ControlRecommendationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker used for real‑time streaming of sensor telemetry to the digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for asset identification and metadata management."
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetMetadataService
]

instance DashboardFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard framework used for real‑time visualization of joint friction dynamics and simulated‑vs‑measured comparisons."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance ExecutableSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that executes the MATLAB/Simulink simulation models and provides insight into torque deviations."
    DTDFVocab:provides TorqueDeviationInsight
]

instance ContinuousIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that performs real‑time identification of analytical friction models and updates friction parameters."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterUpdateInsight
]

instance ControlRecommendationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that recommends controller parameter adjustments and maintenance actions based on identified deviations."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControllerParameterAdjustmentAction,
                  MaintenanceRecommendationAction
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that visualizes joint friction dynamics, simulated‑vs‑measured torque, and position traces in real time."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that streams raw sensor data from MQTT to the digital shadow."
]

instance AssetMetadataService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that provides asset identification and metadata management."
]

// C17: Insights
instance FrictionParameterUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updated friction model parameters inferred from continuous identification of white‑box and data‑driven models."
]

instance TorqueDeviationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Deviation between simulated and measured torque traces, indicating potential model inaccuracies."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time visual representation of joint friction dynamics and trace comparisons."
]

// C17: Actions
instance ControllerParameterAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic recommendation to adjust controller parameters for improved motion accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MaintenanceRecommendationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic recommendation for maintenance actions to improve joint performance."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A single digital shadow instance for the first axis, consisting of sensor data ingestion via MQTT, a processing layer that executes the Simulink simulation models, a data trace aggregation layer that ties measured and simulated signals to the structural model, and a dashboard that visualises the friction identification results; the entire constellation is configured through the Digital Shadow Reference Model and instantiated as a concrete realization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is ensured by the traceability of each data trace back to its generating source and processing component, the use of formally specified structural models, and the comparison of simulated and measured signals to validate friction model accuracy. Uncertainty arises from sensor noise and model parameter estimation but is continuously addressed through online identification."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "All PT–DT data exchanges use MQTT over a local network; the digital shadow subscribes to robot sensor topics and publishes dashboard updates; the system employs Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for asset identification and metadata."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The modeling is based on SysML, Asset Administration Shells (AAS), and architecture description languages such as ACME, MontiArc, and AADL, thus adhering to industry standards for system engineering and digital twins."
]
